description: Polish cycle 4: final pass. Three hotfixes already landed on this branch (342ceff, a413e3a, 5f4e08d). Remaining: pre-existing octave-bundle unit tests fail in dev environments without the bundled Windows binary, workspace column can clip on narrow widths, command window bottom fill, and a final sweep for any remaining cosmetic rough edges. Reference screenshot /tmp/polish-cdp-06.png.

userStories.title: Gate octave-bundle tests to skip when the bundle is absent
userStories.description: Four unit tests in tests/unit/octave-config.test.ts and tests/unit/download-octave*.test.ts fail in dev environments because they assert the presence of resources/octave/mingw64/bin/octave-cli.exe (only downloaded by the packaging scripts). They should gracefully skip when the file is missing instead of hard-failing, so `npm test` returns green on clean checkouts.
acceptanceCriteria: Each assertion that requires a bundled Octave binary is wrapped in `describe.skipIf(...)` or equivalent so it skips when the binary is absent
The test intent (verifying path correctness) is preserved: run the assertion when the bundle is present, skip with a clear reason when it isn't
`npm test` exits with code 0 on a clean checkout with no bundled Octave
Running `npm run download:octave` on Windows still satisfies the tests
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Workspace column minSize and header ellipsis
userStories.description: The Workspace pane's 'No variables in workspace' header still clips horizontally at narrow column widths. Set a hard minSize on the workspace column in the rc-dock layout and add text-overflow ellipsis on the header.
acceptanceCriteria: buildDockLayoutFromVisibility sets minSize: 200 (or similar) on the right (workspace) column panel
.ws-content header text uses white-space: nowrap + text-overflow: ellipsis OR wraps cleanly to a second line
Playwright: workspace header text is fully visible at 1600x900 viewport
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Command Window output area fills pane vertically
userStories.description: The Command Window shows the >> prompt at the top-left and leaves a large empty area below. The output area should anchor the prompt to the bottom (or stretch a scrollable history region to fill the pane).
acceptanceCriteria: When the Command Window pane is tall and no commands have run yet, the visible content fills the pane (no gray void beneath the prompt)
History scrolls naturally as new output arrives; prompt stays visible
FitAddon still triggers on pane resize
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Final visual-polish baseline refresh
userStories.description: After the final fixes, refresh the visual-polish Playwright baseline screenshot so CI has a valid comparison target.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/visual-polish.spec.ts runs against the current polished dark layout and passes
Baseline snapshot updated and committed
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
